prompt: Analyze PRD and produce structured requirements: user stories with IDs, GIVEN-WHEN-THEN ACs (>=3/story), NFRs with thresholds, test skeletons, traceability matrix, ambiguity scores (all <50).
assertions: User Story IDs match US-XXX-XXX format
At least 3 ACs per user story
NFRs have measurable thresholds with NFR-XXX-XXX IDs
Test skeleton IDs match T-AC-XXX format
Traceability matrix links PRD -> Story -> AC -> Test with no orphans
